zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger III de Foix於大約1090年出生在法國米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦福-盧拉爾時，他的父親Roger II de Foix26歲，母親Estefania de Besalu16歲。他於1130年之前與Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1148年11月在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger III de Foix于大约1090年出生在法国米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦福-盧拉爾时，他的父亲Roger II de Foix26岁，母亲Estefania de Besalu16岁。他于1130年之前与Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona在法国奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1148年11月在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Dieter, Frieda, Guenter, Heinz, Lothar.
Americanized form of German Voit and of it Polish variant Fojt.

variants.name: Voit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eberhard, Erwin, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger III de Foix was born about 1090, in Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Roger II de Foix, was 26 and his mother, Estefania de Besalu, was 16. He married Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona before 1130, in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in November 1148, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger III de Foix est né environ 1090, à Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Roger II de Foix, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Estefania de Besalu, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona avant 1130, à Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1148, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger III de Foix um 1090 in Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger II de Foix 26 und seine Mutter Estefania de Besalu 16. Er hat vor 1130 in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im November 1148 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger III de Foix è nato il circa 1090 nel Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Roger II de Foix, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Estefania de Besalu, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona prima del 1130, nel Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1148, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger III de Foixが約1090年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスアリeッジフォイックスフォイクス-ルラルで生まれた時，父Roger II de Foixは26歳，母Estefania de Besaluは16歳であった。1130年以前にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジフォイックスでJimena Berenguer de Barcelonaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1148年11月に故郷で59歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger III de Foix(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 애리e지 포이스 포이스-루럴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger II de Foix(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Estefania de Besalu(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1130년 이전 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 포이스에서 Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1148년 11월 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger III de Foix nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Roger II de Foix, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Estefania de Besalu, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona antes 1130, em Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1148, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger III de Foix родился около 1090 г. в местности фоикс-рураль, фоикс, ариeдж, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger II de Foix было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Estefania de Besalu, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona перед 1130 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, окситани, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1148 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger III de Foix nació aproximadamente 1090, en Foix-Rural, Foix, Ariège, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Roger II de Foix, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Estefania de Besalu, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona antes de 1130, en Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1148, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en España.
